message_text: I do want to clear this loan, but I cannot pay the full amount today.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I’m contacting you about your Nira loan ending ****4831. To verify I’m speaking with the right person, please confirm the last four digits of the account reference.
I’m not comfortable sharing account details here, but I do want to sort this out and can discuss a realistic payment plan.

Understood. If you’re not comfortable verifying in this chat, I’ll stop the assessment here and pass forward that you want to discuss a realistic payment plan without sharing verification details in this channel.

Channel-discomfort refusal noted; avoid further verification requests in this channel and do not re-ask capacity facts already in state. Priority for Agent 2: address hardship/review first and review policy-allowed options in next_allowed_actions (OFFER_REDUCED_CLOSURE, OFFER_PAYMENT_PLAN) as appropriate without restarting assessment or repeating verification in this channel."}

Thanks, please note that I’m willing to pay but need a realistic plan because of a temporary cash flow issue.

Given the temporary cash flow issue and the hardship already noted, the current policy boundary is that any payment arrangement must complete within 30 days. Based on what you already shared, one policy-compliant path to review is 2,000 now with the remaining balance cleared by 2026-04-20. If that timing still stands, I can record that hardship-based request for review. No arrangement is finalized unless approved terms are confirmed.

I can manage 2,000 now, but because of a family medical expense and a delayed salary credit, I’d need the remaining balance scheduled for after my next salary date; if 2026-04-20 fits within that, please submit it for review.

{"reply":"I’ve recorded your hardship-based request for review: 2,000 now and the remaining balance by 2026-04-20. That timing fits the current 30-day policy window. No arrangement is finalized unless approved terms are confirmed. Agent 3 should continue naturally without restarting, without repeating disclosures or verification, and should contact the borrower only if there is a concrete approved option or review outcome; avoid repetitive status-only updates and avoid re-asking the already recorded 2,000 now / 2026-04-20 timing.","latest_handoff_stage":"RESOLUTION"} }
Thanks for noting it. Please go ahead with the review, and only contact me if that 2,000 now and the balance by 2026-04-20 is approved.

Understood. I’ve recorded your request for review for 2,000 now and the remaining balance by 2026-04-20, and I’ve noted your preference to be contacted only if that option is approved. No further outreach will be made here.
